description: Single pack with all remaining RPI cycle subpacks after Cycle 2.

cycles.title: RPI Cycle 2.1 — Link semantic validation docs, curate templates, and inventory shipped asset warnings
cycles.goal: Finish Cycle 2 by linking the new semantic validation docs, deciding template curation, and producing a warning inventory for shipped skills/agents.

cycles.title: RPI Cycle 3 — Hook lifecycle catalog and adapter capability mapping
cycles.goal: Define a neutral hook lifecycle and map current hook assets honestly to each supported adapter.

cycles.title: RPI Cycle 4 — Trace/eval workflow templates and rubric assets
cycles.goal: Add trace/eval improvement-loop templates and first-class rubric assets without adding a judge, scorer, daemon, or runtime.

cycles.title: RPI Cycle 5 — MCP examples, adapter capability docs, official compliance matrix, and token-rent/minimality
cycles.goal: Improve MCP/tool-selection guidance, adapter capability documentation, official compliance tracking, and token-rent/minimality visibility.

cycles.title: RPI Cycle 6 — Context/handoff, multi-agent boundary, init headless clarity, and server L3 clarity
cycles.goal: Complete the remaining guidance layer: context compaction, handoff, multi-agent boundary, init populate clarity, and server capability levels.

definition_of_done_for_all_cycles: Cycle-specific goals completed or clearly scoped
vibe-lab remains the process/quality asset layer
